title: The Flowering Orchard.
content:
Silk Embroidery.

    Lo silken my garden,
    and silken my sky,
    And silken my apple-boughs
    hanging on high;
    All wrought by the Worm
    in the peasant carle's cot
    On the Mulberry leafage
    when summer was hot!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Morris delivers a powerful performance in "The Flowering Orchard."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
